code-with-quarkus_3/.mvn/wrapper/MavenWr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.

code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21.
code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; compiling with release 17 would produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail if the source code uses Java 21 features.

code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the maven-compiler-plugin release configuration to 21.
code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21 bytecode, aligning with the property change and preventing potential misconfiguration.
